_comment: Host-local registry for the macOS Feishu<->Claude Code multi-bot bridge. COPY to ~/.lark-cli/daemon/bot-registry.json and fill in real values. NEVER commit the real one (it is git-ignored). Secrets (app_secret) live ONLY in the lark-cli keychain, never here. 'default' is null ON PURPOSE: there is no default-bot fallback — if outbound routing cannot resolve a bot (no FEISHU_BOT env, no project-dir match), the bridge does NOT send; it asks the user which bot to use.

primary._note: profile == app_id by convention (per-command `--profile <app_id>`). chat_id is the p2p single-chat between you and this bot. as=bot uses the tenant token from keychain (no user login needed).
